name: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
overview: There's no such thing as "a regular day" at Denver's Planned Pethood Plus veterinary clinic. For 80,000-plus clients and their pets, the clinic and its maverick ER vet Dr. Jeff Young represent one last hope and possibly the difference between life and death.

trailers.title: This Poor Little Pup Might Lose His Leg | Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
